title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif and Simon Eskildsen discuss infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the role of AI in modern engineering. The conversation covers flash sales infrastructure, database innovation patterns, and hiring top-tier engineers in the AI era.
